headline: Assessing Waste Management (WM) Valuation After Mixed Share Performance And Modest Undervaluation Estimate
summary: Recent share performance and business scale Waste Management (WM) has delivered mixed returns recently, with the stock up over the past month and past year but down over the past 3 months. That uneven share performance is prompting some investors to revisit the company’s fundamentals. The stock last closed at US$224.28, giving the company a market value of about US$88.9b. Over the past month it gained 4.8%, while over the past 3 months it declined 6.0% and over the past year it declined 2.7%...

headline: Is Waste Management, Inc. (WM) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is WM a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Waste Management, Inc. on r/investing_discussion by Variant_Invest. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on WM. Waste Management, Inc.’s share was trading at $224.28 as of June 10th. WM’s trailing and forward P/E were 32.46 and 27.17 respectively according to Yahoo […]
